title: List legacy model providers
summary: Read legacy model provider rows during the Settings V2 compatibility window. New configuration should use Runtime settings instead.

response.name: data
response.description: Legacy model provider rows with API key state only; secret values are never returned.

response.name: has_more
response.description: Always false for this compatibility endpoint.

title: Create legacy model provider
summary: Deprecated mutation endpoint. Returns 410 Gone and points clients to /v1/x/settings.

title: Set legacy model default
summary: Deprecated mutation endpoint. Returns 410 Gone and points clients to /v1/x/settings.
